problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
